subcodes.first_line: O friends! With the ears of your souls, hearken unto the Call of the Wronged One of the horizons. He is the Kawthar of reunion for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان ندای مظلوم آفاق را بگوش جان بشنوید اوست کوثر وصال از برای
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @thankfulness; gratitude, @knowledge; recognition of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
